title: Scuba diving @ Cove 2 - Review of Alki Beach, Seattle, WA - Tripadvisor
content: Sign in to get trip updates and message other travelers. # Scuba diving @ Cove 2 - Alki Beach. **#25** of 921 things to do in Seattle. *   Image 4 1 ### Seattle's Original Guided Harbor Cruise 4.7 (856) from $46. Went diving in cove 2 next to Marination. It is a good dive for beginners and experts alike. *   Image 6 3 ### Seattle by Land and Sea Experience Tour 5.0 (4) from $164. *   Image 7 4 ### Seattle: Rainforest, Beach, and Olympic National Park Highlights 5.0 (32) from $285. I guess the only bummer here is what is going on in the rest of the older sections. Alki beach has it all, sand, rocky shoreline, shops, restaurants, and best of all, a great view of downtown Seattle. If you are a photo enthusiast, you have to visit Alki beach during the daytime and also at night as there is a great view of Seattle from this point.
